violations.description: Duplicate replay test validates suppression metadata but does not assert persisted timeline cardinality after replay.
violations.suggestion: Fetch thread detail after duplicate delivery and assert exactly one appended event for the dedupe key.

violations.description: Existing-thread scenario asserts inbound event count > 0 rather than enforcing expected increment boundaries.
violations.suggestion: Capture baseline timeline count pre-webhook and assert +1 increment post-webhook.

untested_user_paths: Post-replay timeline cardinality verification in API contract

recommendations: Add explicit post-duplicate timeline cardinality check
Strengthen existing-thread assertions with baseline delta checks
Keep current AC1-AC4 + refusal + concurrency scenario coverage as the story baseline
summary: Coverage is strong across all story acceptance criteria plus refusal/concurrency behavior, with two targeted assertion-depth gaps.
